ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "pin" INTEGER /* Pin number for the component */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the component */,
  "symbolic_name" TEXT /* Symbolic name associated with the component */,
  "drive_capacity" TEXT /* Drive capacity of the component */,
  "irq" TEXT /* IRQ number */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of operation */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output */,
  "pull_up" TEXT /* Pull up configuration */,
  "port_capabilities" TEXT /* Capabilities of the port */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the datasheet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Microcontroller, Sensor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the component belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this specification belongs to */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., Voltage, Current) */,
  "spec_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the specification (e.g., V, A) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.1) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this documentation belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "doc_url" TEXT /* URL of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Engineer, Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view component) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Symbolic name associated with the component
Timestamp when the component was created
Timestamp when the component was last updated
Name of the category (e.g., Microcontroller, Sensor)
ID of the parent category (for subcategories)
ID of the category the component belongs to

Unit of the specification (e.g., V, A)
ID of the component this version belongs to
ID of the component this documentation belongs to

ID of the role assigned to the user
